assertions.description: Output contains at least 3 topic sections (国际新闻, 科技/AI, 企业动态, etc.)
Each news item has exactly 3 sentences followed by a summary paragraph
Output includes source attribution for news items
Output is primarily in simplified Chinese
News items reference real, verifiable events (not invented content)
Output includes news about at least one of: ByteDance, Tencent, Xiaohongshu, NVIDIA, Microsoft, Meta, Google, Apple
